name: update_sw_parameters
short_description: Update the dcp by adding the generated sw param info files to it
full_help:
update_sw_parameters

Description: 
Update the dcp by adding the generated sw param info files to it

Syntax: 
update_sw_parameters  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
